title: Granite directional prediction analytics
description: Scenario pack for isolated analytics runs. The scripts are medium-parameterized and can be reused with other medium ids even though the default bundle is prepared for granite.

metadata.notes: Starter preset for hard crystalline rock. Replace with validated laboratory values when available.

comparison_cases.label: Baseline 2D thermal pulse
comparison_cases.notes: Reference 2D granite scenario in the x-y plane.

comparison_cases.label: Baseline 3D thermal pulse
comparison_cases.notes: Reference 3D granite scenario with non-zero z direction and probe depth.

comparison_cases.label: High-temperature 3D
comparison_cases.notes: Elevated thermal loading while preserving the same geometry.

comparison_cases.label: High-pressure 3D
comparison_cases.notes: Higher confining pressure with the same source and probe locations.

comparison_cases.label: 3D point-force excitation
comparison_cases.notes: Directional forcing with stronger z contribution.

comparison_cases.label: 3D elevated probe
comparison_cases.notes: Probe moved closer to the top of the volume to verify elevation sensitivity.
